# services.kimai

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.kimai`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.kimai.sites` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Specification of one or more Kimai sites to serve |
| `services.kimai.sites.<name>.database.charset` | `string` | Database charset. |
| `services.kimai.sites.<name>.database.createLocally` | `boolean` | Create the database and database user locally. |
| `services.kimai.sites.<name>.database.host` | `string` | Database host address. |
| `services.kimai.sites.<name>.database.name` | `string` | Database name. |
| `services.kimai.sites.<name>.database.passwordFile` | `null or absolute path` | A file containing the password corresponding to {option}`database.user`. |
| `services.kimai.sites.<name>.database.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Database host port. |
| `services.kimai.sites.<name>.database.serverVersion` | `null or string` | MySQL *exact* version string. Not used if `createdLocally` is set, but must be set otherwise. See <https://www.kimai.org/documentation/installation.html#column-table_name-in-where-clause-is-ambiguous> for how to set this value, especially if you're using MariaDB. |
| `services.kimai.sites.<name>.database.socket` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the unix socket file to use for authentication. |
| `services.kimai.sites.<name>.database.user` | `string` | Database user. |
| `services.kimai.sites.<name>.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | Securely pass environment variabels to Kimai. This can be used to set other environement variables such as MAILER_URL. |
| `services.kimai.sites.<name>.package` | `package` | The kimai package to use. |
| `services.kimai.sites.<name>.poolConfig` | `attribute set of (string or signed integer or boolean)` | Options for the Kimai PHP pool. See the documentation on `php-fpm.conf` for details on configuration directives. |
| `services.kimai.sites.<name>.settings` | `attribute set of anything` | Structural Kimai's local.yaml configuration. Refer to <https://www.kimai.org/documentation/local-yaml.html#localyaml> for details. |
| `services.kimai.webserver` | `value "nginx" (singular enum)` | The webserver to configure for the PHP frontend. At the moment, only `nginx` is supported. PRs are welcome for support for other web servers. |
